free

no obligation

Free Custom Design Consultation

Get expert advice from 30+ years of experience. No obligation, just professional guidance to create the perfect locker room solution for your team. We've helped hundreds of programs upgrade their facilities with custom athletic lockers.

Get Started Today

Call us at 1 (888) 58-STALL

how it works

OUR PROCESS

1

Free Consultation

Fill out the custom form and we'll get in touch with you. We start with a free custom design consultation to understand your needs, space, and vision.

2

Custom Design

We create a design to fit your budget and space.

3

Manufacturing

We manufacture lockers for you using premium 3/4" solid wood and the highest quality materials.

4

Delivery

We deliver your lockers to your facility so your locker room is ready for your team.

Free Custom Design Consultation +

Every project starts with a free custom design consultation. We'll discuss your needs, space, budget, and vision to understand exactly what you're looking for. No obligation, just expert advice from 30+ years of experience. Learn more about our process.

5 Year Warranty +

We're confident in the quality of our wood sports lockers and back every locker with a 5 year warranty. Our modular design means damaged parts can be replaced individually—no need to replace the entire locker. Discover the advantages of modular locker design.

Made to Your Liking +

We build lockers to your specs, your style, and your space. Choose from our Essential or Premium lines, quick ship or full custom—colors, sizes, and options are up to you. Tell us what you want and we'll make it happen.

Sport-Specific Solutions +

We have all the shapes and sizes that are required for most locker rooms. From hockey lockers to football equipment storage, we design sport-specific solutions. Explore our sport-specific design guide.

PLAY OF THE WEEK

Powerful Sports Theme

Taste the Victory

Etiam scelerisque tortor at lectus dapibus, nec fermentum feugiat diam. Morbi rutrum magna et dui feugiat, non tristique mi aliquam.

Read more Contact Us
testimonials

trusted by champions

what our clients say

Head Coach

"These lockers aren't just furniture—they're an investment in our culture. Our recruits notice the difference immediately."

Athletic Director

"After 15 years, our PlayerStall lockers still look professional. The modular design has saved us thousands in repairs."

Facilities Manager

"The free custom design service made all the difference. They understood our space and created the perfect solution."

Hockey Coach

"The reinforced construction handles our heavy hockey gear perfectly. These lockers are built to last."

why choose us

WHY WOOD OUTPERFORMS
METAL

After 30+ years in the business, we've seen it all. Wood lockers aren't just a trend—they're a superior choice. Wood creates a professional, prestigious atmosphere that metal simply can't match. When properly cared for, wood outlasts metal. Our lockers have been in use for 15+ years and still look professional.

Read our comprehensive wood vs metal comparison guide to learn about durability, maintenance, and long-term value.

Learn More

why our prices

EFFICIENT PRODUCTION.
UNBEATABLE VALUE.

We run an efficient operation. We focus on a core few models and don't stop production—no constant changeovers, no idle time. That lets us keep costs down and pass the savings to you. High-quality lockers at unbeatable prices: it's not magic, it's smart manufacturing.

Learn More

LOCKERS

Premium wood. Unbeatable price.

Custom sports lockers for collegiate and professional teams. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks or full custom in 8–12 weeks. 30+ years experience. 5 year warranty.

Shop Now

PlayerStall

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks (Stadium & Elite) or custom wood, phenolic & more in 8–12 weeks. Price match guarantee. 30+ years experience.
